mapper.select: /* Chatmapper.selectChatRoomByUserId : 채팅방 조회 (채팅방 존재 여부 확인) */ SELECT me.chatroom_member_id, me.chatroom_id, me.uid, me.chatroom_name FROM (SELECT * FROM tb_chatroom_member WHERE uid = #{writeUid} AND delete_yn = 'N' AND delete_at IS null AND delete_id IS NULL) me JOIN (SELECT * FROM tb_chatroom_member WHERE uid = #{receiverId} AND delete_yn = 'N' AND delete_at IS null AND delete_id IS NULL) trg ON me.chatroom_id = trg.chatroom_id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
/* Chatmapper.insertChatRoomMember : 채팅방 멤버 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_chatroom_member ( chatroom_id, uid, chatroom_name, last_read_at, create_at, create_id ) VALUES
( #{chatroomId}, #{uid}, #{title}, now(), now(), #{createUid} )

/* Chatmapper.insertChatMessage : 채팅 메시지 등록 (구버전) */ INSERT INTO tb_chatroom_message ( chat_message_id, chatroom_id, write_uid, chat_message_type_code, chat_message_content_type_code, chat_message_content, delete_member_uid_arr, appointment_id, create_at, create_id ) VALUES ( #{chatMessageId}, #{chatroomId}, #{writeUid}, #{chatMessageTypeCode}, #{chatMessageContentTypeCode}, #{chatMessageContent}, #{deleteMemberUidArr}, #{appointmentId}, COALESCE(#{workAt}, now()), #{workId} )
mapper.select: /* Chatmapper.selectChatRoomById : 채팅방 단건 조회 */ SELECT tb.chatroom_member_id AS chatroom_member_id, tb.chatroom_id AS chatroom_id, tb.uid AS uid, tb.chatroom_name AS chatroom_name, tb.last_read_at AS last_read_at, tb.create_at AS create_at, COALESCE(lm.last_message_at, cr.create_at) AS update_at, lm.last_message AS last_message, lm.last_message_at AS last_message_at, lm.last_message_author AS last_message_author_id, COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM tb_chatroom_member tb JOIN tb_chatroom cr ON cr.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cr.delete_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT cm.chat_message_content AS last_message, cm.create_at AS last_message_at, cm.write_uid AS last_message_author FROM tb_chatroom_message cm WHERE cm.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cm.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY cm.create_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM tb_chatroom_message cm2 WHERE cm2.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cm2.delete_yn = 'N' AND cm2.create_at > COALESCE(tb.last_read_at, tb.create_at) AND cm2.write_uid != tb.uid ) uc ON true WHERE tb.delete_yn = 'N' AND tb.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} LIMIT 1

/* Chatmapper.selectChatRoomList : 로그인 유저가 속한 채팅방 목록 + 관련 정보 조회 */ SELECT tb.chatroom_member_id AS chatroom_member_id, tb.chatroom_id AS chatroom_id, tb.uid AS uid, tb.chatroom_name AS chatroom_name, tb.last_read_at AS last_read_at, tb.create_at AS create_at, /* 최신 메시지 시각을 updateAt으로 사용 (없으면 채팅방 생성일) */ COALESCE(lm.last_message_at, cr.create_at) AS update_at, lm.last_message AS last_message, lm.last_message_at AS last_message_at, lm.last_message_author AS last_message_author_id, /* 안읽은 메시지 수 */ COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM tb_chatroom_member tb /* 채팅방 기본 정보 */ JOIN tb_chatroom cr ON cr.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cr.delete_yn = 'N' /* 최신 메시지 (LATERAL 서브쿼리) */ LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT cm.chat_message_content AS last_message, cm.create_at AS last_message_at, cm.write_uid AS last_message_author FROM tb_chatroom_message cm WHERE cm.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cm.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY cm.create_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON true /* 안읽은 메시지 수 */ LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM tb_chatroom_message cm2 WHERE cm2.chatroom_id = tb.chatroom_id AND cm2.delete_yn = 'N' AND cm2.create_at > COALESCE(tb.last_read_at, tb.create_at) AND cm2.write_uid != tb.uid ) uc ON true
ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.last_message_at, cr.create_at) DESC
/* Chatmapper.selectChatRoomPagingCount : 채팅방 목록 전체 카운트 조회 */ SELECT count(*) FROM tb_chatroom_member tb
mapper.insert: /* Chatmapper.insertChatMessageV2 : 채팅 메시지 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_chatroom_message ( chat_message_id, chatroom_id, write_uid, chat_message_type_code, chat_message_content_type_code, chat_message_content, delete_member_uid_arr, appointment_id, create_at, create_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{chatroomId}, #{authorId}, #{messageType}, #{messageTextType}, #{message}, #{deleteMemberUidArr}, #{appointmentId}, COALESCE(#{createAt}, now()), #{authorId} )
